from collections import OrderedDict


def sort_users_by_priority(users: dict[str, int]) -> list[str]:
    return sorted(users.keys(), key=lambda k: users[k])


def get_sorted_report_keys(report_data: dict[str, float]) -> list[str]:
    return sorted(report_data.keys(), key=lambda k: report_data[k])


def rank_items_by_score(items: dict[str, int]) -> list[str]:
    return sorted(items.keys(), key=lambda k: items[k])


def order_by_insertion(d: OrderedDict[str, str]) -> list[str]:
    return list(d.keys())


def sort_metrics(metrics: dict[str, float]) -> list[tuple[str, float]]:
    return sorted(metrics.items(), key=lambda kv: kv[1])
